name: ocimum tenuiflorum
title: best benefits of ocimum tenuiflorum
description: Ocimum tenuiflorum heals wounds by promoting tissue repair and regeneration, thereby reducing the risk of infection and promoting a faster recovery. This benefit is particularly important for individuals with deep cuts, burns, or other types of trauma, as it can help prevent long-term scarring and promote optimal healing.
